SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SUSAN HANSEN--HR. MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROYAL AUTO GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAN KASSEL, MATTHEW $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
